name: openEuler TC SIG
description: The openEuler Technical Committee (TC) is responsible for technical decision-making and resource coordination in the openEuler community.

name: openEuler TC SIG Repository List
description: openEuler TC SIG maintains 5 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler TC SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The openEuler Technical Committee (TC) is responsible for technical decision-making and resource coordination in the openEuler community.. The SIG has 27 core members and maintains 5 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler TC SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler TC SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at tc@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler TC SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler TC SIG maintains 5 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/TC.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler TC SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler TC SIG has 6 Maintainers, including: Cao Zhi, Chen Maodong, Chen Qide. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
